reviews.review_description:
IF YOU TRY WITH YOUR KIDS, I RECOMMEND THIS GAME. :) THIS IS VERY CUTIE AS U CAN SEE. BUT IT NEED MORE STRATEGIES THAN YOU THINK SOMETIME. AND THE COSTUMES!! DRIVE ME CRAZY HAHAHA.. 
IMO, IT’S WORTH TRYING THIS.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much!~~ It's a fun game to play with kids and these Kakao Friends characters are only available in this game!
